page.content: The first table presents data on total score ranges, with headers including Total score range, % Correct, Pre-test (n, %), Post-test (n, %), and an additional column. The data shows that for the score range 0–13, there are 15 participants with a 9.9% correct rate and no post-test participants, while the range 14–18 had 62 participants achieving 40.8% in the pre-test and 2 participants at 1.3% in the post-test. The range 19–23 had 69 participants with a 45.4% pre-test score and 54 participants achieving 35.5% in the post-test.

page.content: In the range 24–26, there were 6 participants with a pre-test score of 3.9% and 96 participants achieving 63.2% in the post-test. The overall total score averages are 18.1 (M) with a standard deviation (SD) of 3.6 for the pre-test and 23.9 (M) with an SD of 1.8 for the post-test, yielding a p-value of 0.000. The second table outlines types of days and wear time on work and non-work days with headers for Work day, Non-work day, Work hours on work day, and Non-work hours on work day. The sustained sedentary time >30 mins (%wear time ± SD) is 34.1 ± 11.6 on work days, 26.9 ± 11.1 on non-work days, and 40.8 ± 16.6 for work hours on work days, with 25.8 ± 9.6 for non-work hours. Light activity bouts 0–5 mins (%wear time ± SD) are 13.4 ± 2.2 on work days, 14.6 ± 2.8 on non-work days, 12.2 ± 3.1 for work hours, and 15.4 ± 2.2 for non-work hours, resulting in 14.8 ± 2.3. Light activity bouts 5–10 mins (%wear time ± SD) are recorded as 4.1 ± 2.1 for work days, 7.5 ± 3.7 on non-work days, 2.6 ± 1.7 for work hours, and 6.5 ± 3.4 for non-work hours, producing 7.2 ± 3.3. MVPA bouts > 10 mins (% wear time ± SD) are 1.2 ± 1.6 on work days, 1.1 ± 1.9 on non-work days, 0.5 ± 1.0 for work hours, and 2.2 ± 3.2 for non-work hours, resulting in 1.4 ± 2.0. Breaks in sedentary time (breaks/sed hour ± SD) are 6.0 ± 1.4 for work days, 9.2 ± 9.8 on non-work days, 5.1 ± 1.7 for work hours, and 7.9 ± 2.1 for non-work hours, culminating in 8.0 ± 2.6.
